editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 17 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 17 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: World Day for International Justice — 17 July
articles.summary: World Day for International Justice (17 July) marks the adoption of the Rome Statute (1998) that established the International Criminal Court (ICC).
articles.summary_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय न्याय दिवस (17 जुलाई) Rome Statute (1998) को चिह्नित करता है, जिससे International Criminal Court (ICC) बना।
articles.content:
World Day for International Justice is observed every year on 17 July. It commemorates the adoption of the Rome Statute on 17 July 1998, which created the International Criminal Court (ICC).

The ICC prosecutes individuals for genocide, crimes against humanity, war crimes, and the crime of aggression. Its headquarters is in The Hague, Netherlands.

India has not ratified the Rome Statute and is not a party to the ICC, citing concerns over sovereignty and possible political misuse.

For IB ACIO: date (17 July), Rome Statute (1998), ICC HQ (The Hague), and India’s non-membership are key facts.
articles.content_hi:
अंतर्राष्ट्रीय न्याय दिवस हर वर्ष 17 जुलाई। Rome Statute 17 जुलाई 1998 — ICC की स्थापना।

ICC: genocide, crimes against humanity, war crimes, aggression। HQ: The Hague।

India Rome Statute का पक्षकार नहीं। IB ACIO: 17 July, 1998, The Hague — याद रखें।
articles.question: World Day for International Justice is observed on which date?
articles.question_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय न्याय दिवस किस तिथि को मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: It is observed on 17 July to mark the adoption of the Rome Statute in 1998.
articles.explanation_hi: Rome Statute 1998 की याद में हर वर्ष 17 जुलाई को मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: ICC is distinct from ICJ (also in The Hague). ICJ settles disputes between states; ICC tries individuals.
articles.moreInfo_hi: ICC व्यक्तियों पर मुकदमा; ICJ राज्यों के विवाद। दोनों The Hague में।

articles.title: International Criminal Court (ICC) vs International Court of Justice (ICJ)
articles.summary: ICC tries individuals for serious international crimes; ICJ settles legal disputes between UN member states — both based in The Hague.
articles.summary_hi: ICC व्यक्तियों पर गंभीर अंतर्राष्ट्रीय अपराधों का मुकदमा; ICJ UN सदस्य राज्यों के विवाद सुलझाता है — दोनों The Hague में।
articles.content:
The International Court of Justice (ICJ) is the principal judicial organ of the United Nations, established in 1945. It hears cases between states and gives advisory opinions.

The International Criminal Court (ICC) was created by the Rome Statute (1998) and began functioning in 2002. It tries individuals, not states.

ICJ is a UN organ; ICC is an independent treaty-based court, not a UN organ. India is a UN member (and accepts ICJ in principle) but is not a party to the ICC.

For IB ACIO: ICJ (1945, UN organ), ICC (1998/2002, individuals), both HQ The Hague — classic comparison question.
articles.content_hi:
ICJ: UN का मुख्य न्यायिक अंग (1945), राज्यों के विवाद। ICC: Rome Statute 1998, 2002 से कार्य, व्यक्तियों पर मुकदमा।

ICJ = UN अंग; ICC = स्वतंत्र संधि न्यायालय। India ICC का पक्षकार नहीं।

IB ACIO: ICJ vs ICC तुलना — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which court was established by the Rome Statute of 1998?
articles.question_hi: 1998 के Rome Statute द्वारा कौन सा न्यायालय स्थापित हुआ?
articles.explanation: The Rome Statute established the International Criminal Court (ICC).
articles.explanation_hi: Rome Statute ने International Criminal Court (ICC) की स्थापना की।
articles.moreInfo: Related: today’s International Justice Day article. PCIJ was the League of Nations court before ICJ.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: आज का International Justice Day। PCIJ League of Nations का न्यायालय था।

articles.title: Election Commission of India — Article 324
articles.summary: The Election Commission of India is a constitutional body under Article 324 that conducts free and fair elections to Parliament and State Legislatures.
articles.summary_hi: चुनाव आयोग धारा 324 के तहत संवैधानिक निकाय — संसद और राज्य विधानमंडलों के स्वतंत्र निष्पक्ष चुनाव।
articles.content:
The Election Commission of India (ECI) is established under Article 324 of the Constitution. It superintends, directs, and controls elections to Parliament, State Legislatures, and the offices of President and Vice-President.

It consists of the Chief Election Commissioner and other Election Commissioners (currently a multi-member body). They are appointed by the President. Removal of CEC is similar to a Supreme Court judge.

ECI prepares electoral rolls, recognises political parties, and enforces the Model Code of Conduct during elections.

For IB ACIO: Article 324, multi-member ECI, and MCC are election GK essentials.
articles.content_hi:
ECI धारा 324। संसद, राज्य विधानमंडल, राष्ट्रपति/उपराष्ट्रपति चुनाव।

CEC + Election Commissioners, राष्ट्रपति नियुक्त। CEC हटाना SC जज जैसा।

IB ACIO: धारा 324, Model Code of Conduct — याद रखें।
articles.question: Election Commission of India draws its power mainly from which Article?
articles.question_hi: भारत का चुनाव आयोग मुख्यतः किस धारा से शक्ति लेता है?
articles.explanation: Article 324 provides for the Election Commission and its powers over elections.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 324 चुनाव आयोग और चुनावों पर उसके नियंत्रण का प्रावधान करती है।
articles.moreInfo: Contrast: CAG (148), Finance Commission (280), UPSC (315). All constitutional bodies.

articles.title: PM Awas Yojana (PMAY) — Housing for All
articles.title_hi: प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना (PMAY) — सबके लिए आवास
articles.summary: PMAY aims to provide affordable housing to urban and rural poor through PMAY-Urban and PMAY-Gramin components.
articles.summary_hi: PMAY शहरी और ग्रामीण गरीबों को किफायती आवास — PMAY-Urban और PMAY-Gramin।
articles.content:
Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana was launched to achieve ‘Housing for All’. It has two major components: PMAY-Urban (under Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs) and PMAY-Gramin (under Ministry of Rural Development).

Beneficiaries get financial assistance for construction or purchase of a pucca house. PMAY-U includes Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS) for middle-income and EWS/LIG segments.

PMAY-G targets homeless and those living in kutcha houses in rural areas, with a focus on women ownership (preferably in the name of the female head).

For IB ACIO: Housing for All goal, Urban vs Gramin ministries, and CLSS are scheme basics.
articles.content_hi:
PMAY: Housing for All। PMAY-U (आवास मंत्रालय) + PMAY-G (ग्रामीण विकास)।

CLSS क्रेडिट सब्सिडी। PMAY-G में महिला स्वामित्व पर जोर।

IB ACIO: दो घटक, मंत्रालय अलग — याद रखें।
articles.question: PMAY-Gramin is implemented under which Union Ministry?
articles.question_hi: PMAY-Gramin किस केंद्रीय मंत्रालय के तहत लागू होता है?
options: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
articles.explanation: PMAY-Gramin is under the Ministry of Rural Development; PMAY-Urban is under MoHUA.
articles.explanation_hi: PMAY-G ग्रामीण विकास मंत्रालय; PMAY-U आवास और शहरी कार्य मंत्रालय।
articles.moreInfo: PMAY-U 2.0 has been announced to continue urban housing support with revised guidelines.
articles.moreInfo_hi: PMAY-U 2.0 शहरी आवास सहायता जारी रखने के लिए घोषित।

articles.title: Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) of the RBI
articles.summary: The MPC sets the policy repo rate to achieve inflation targeting — 4% CPI with a band of ±2%.
articles.summary_hi: MPC नीतिगत repo rate तय करती है — मुद्रास्फीति लक्ष्य 4% CPI (±2% बैंड)।
articles.content:
The Monetary Policy Committee was constituted under the RBI Act after the 2016 amendment. It has six members: three from RBI (including the Governor as Chairperson) and three external members appointed by the Central Government.

Decisions are by majority vote; the Governor has a casting vote in case of a tie. India follows a flexible inflation targeting framework with 4% CPI inflation as the target (±2%).

MPC meets at least four times a year and publishes a resolution after each meeting.

For IB ACIO: 6 members, inflation target 4% ±2%, and Governor’s casting vote are core facts.
articles.content_hi:
MPC: RBI Act 2016 संशोधन। 6 सदस्य — 3 RBI + 3 बाहरी। Governor अध्यक्ष, tie में casting vote।

मुद्रास्फीति लक्ष्य: 4% CPI (±2%)। वर्ष में कम से कम 4 बैठकें।

IB ACIO: 6 सदस्य, 4%±2% — याद रखें।
articles.question: What is India’s CPI inflation target under the flexible inflation targeting framework?
articles.question_hi: लचीले मुद्रास्फीति लक्ष्य ढांचे के तहत भारत का CPI लक्ष्य क्या है?
articles.explanation: India’s inflation target is 4% Consumer Price Index with a tolerance band of ±2%.
articles.explanation_hi: भारत का लक्ष्य 4% CPI है, सहिष्णुता बैंड ±2%。
articles.moreInfo: Related: RBI repo rate discussions in earlier editions. Repo is the key policy rate set by MPC.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: पहले संस्करणों में RBI repo। MPC repo तय करती है।

articles.title: INS Arihant — India’s Nuclear-Powered Ballistic Missile Submarine
articles.title_hi: INS Arihant — भारत की परमाणु शक्ति चालित बैलिस्टिक मिसाइल पनडुब्बी
articles.summary: INS Arihant is India’s first indigenous nuclear-powered ballistic missile submarine (SSBN), completing the nuclear triad.
articles.summary_hi: INS Arihant भारत की पहली स्वदेशी परमाणु शक्ति चालित SSBN — परमाणु त्रिकोण पूरा।
articles.content:
INS Arihant is the lead ship of India’s Arihant-class SSBNs, developed under the Advanced Technology Vessel (ATV) project with DRDO and BARC involvement.

It can launch K-15 (Sagarika) and longer-range K-4 submarine-launched ballistic missiles (SLBMs). Nuclear-powered submarines provide continuous at-sea deterrence.

With Arihant, India completed its nuclear triad — delivery of nuclear weapons by land (missiles), air (aircraft), and sea (SSBN).

For IB ACIO: first indigenous SSBN, nuclear triad, and K-15/K-4 missiles are defence essentials.
articles.content_hi:
INS Arihant: Arihant-class SSBN, ATV परियोजना। K-15 (Sagarika), K-4 SLBM।

परमाणु त्रिकोण: भूमि, वायु, समुद्र।

IB ACIO: पहली स्वदेशी SSBN, nuclear triad — याद रखें।
articles.question: INS Arihant helped India complete which strategic capability?
articles.question_hi: INS Arihant ने भारत की कौन सी रणनीतिक क्षमता पूरी की?
articles.explanation: Arihant completed India’s nuclear triad by adding a sea-based nuclear deterrent.
articles.explanation_hi: Arihant ने समुद्र-आधारित परमाणु निवारण जोड़कर nuclear triad पूरा किया।
articles.moreInfo: Compare: INS Vikrant (aircraft carrier, earlier edition). SSBN ≠ aircraft carrier.
articles.moreInfo_hi: तुलना: INS Vikrant (विमान वाहक)। SSBN अलग श्रेणी।

articles.title: ISRO’s PSLV — Workhorse Launch Vehicle
articles.title_hi: ISRO का PSLV — विश्वसनीय प्रक्षेपण यान
articles.summary: Polar Satellite Launch Vehicle (PSLV) is ISRO’s most reliable launcher, used for remote sensing satellites and many commercial missions.
articles.summary_hi: PSLV ISRO का सबसे विश्वसनीय प्रक्षेपण यान — रिमोट सेंसिंग और वाणिज्यिक मिशन।
articles.content:
The Polar Satellite Launch Vehicle (PSLV) is a four-stage launch vehicle developed by ISRO. It is known for high reliability and has launched India’s remote sensing satellites into polar/Sun-synchronous orbits.

Famous missions: Chandrayaan-1, Mars Orbiter Mission (Mangalyaan), and numerous foreign satellite launches under commercial contracts via NSIL/Antrix.

Variants include PSLV-CA, PSLV-XL, and PSLV-DL. PSLV-C37 created a world record by launching 104 satellites in a single flight (2017).

For IB ACIO: four-stage, polar orbits, 104-satellite record, and link to Mangalyaan/Chandrayaan-1.
articles.content_hi:
PSLV: चार चरण, ध्रुवीय/SSO कक्षा। Chandrayaan-1, Mangalyaan।

PSLV-C37: एक उड़ान में 104 उपग्रह (2017) विश्व रिकॉर्ड।

IB ACIO: 4-stage, 104 satellites — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which ISRO launcher set a record by placing 104 satellites in one flight?
articles.question_hi: ISRO के किस प्रक्षेपण यान ने एक उड़ान में 104 उपग्रह छोड़ने का रिकॉर्ड बनाया?
articles.explanation: PSLV-C37 launched 104 satellites in a single mission in 2017.
articles.explanation_hi: PSLV-C37 ने 2017 में एक मिशन में 104 उपग्रह प्रक्षेपित किए।
articles.moreInfo: GSLV/LVM3 are for heavier geosynchronous payloads. Related: Chandrayaan-3, Aditya-L1 editions.
articles.moreInfo_hi: GSLV/LVM3 भारी GTO पेलोड। संबंधित: Chandrayaan-3, Aditya-L1।

articles.title: National Mission for Clean Ganga (NMCG)
articles.summary: NMCG implements the Namami Gange programme to rejuvenate the Ganga through sewage treatment, riverfront development, and biodiversity conservation.
articles.summary_hi: NMCG Namami Gange लागू करता है — सीवेज उपचार, रिवरफ्रंट, जैव विविधता संरक्षण।
articles.content:
The National Mission for Clean Ganga (NMCG) is the implementation arm of the Namami Gange Programme, launched in 2014–15 as an integrated conservation mission for the Ganga.

Key pillars: sewage treatment plants (STPs), industrial effluent management, river surface cleaning, afforestation, biodiversity, and public awareness. Ganga was declared the National River of India in 2008.

NMCG functions under the Ministry of Jal Shakti. The Ganga basin covers multiple states including Uttarakhand, UP, Bihar, Jharkhand, and West Bengal.

For IB ACIO: Namami Gange (2014–15), NMCG under Jal Shakti, and National River (2008).
articles.content_hi:
Namami Gange 2014–15। NMCG कार्यान्वयन एजेंसी, जल शक्ति मंत्रालय।

STP, प्रदूषण नियंत्रण, जैव विविधता। गंगा राष्ट्रीय नदी 2008।

IB ACIO: 2014–15, Jal Shakti, 2008 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Namami Gange programme is implemented by which organisation?
articles.question_hi: Namami Gange कार्यक्रम किस संगठन द्वारा लागू होता है?
articles.explanation: The National Mission for Clean Ganga (NMCG) implements Namami Gange.
articles.explanation_hi: National Mission for Clean Ganga (NMCG) Namami Gange लागू करता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Jal Jeevan Mission (earlier edition) also under Ministry of Jal Shakti.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Jal Jeevan Mission भी जल शक्ति मंत्रालय के तहत।

articles.title: Preamble of the Indian Constitution — Key Words
articles.title_hi: भारतीय संविधान की प्रस्तावना — मुख्य शब्द
articles.summary: The Preamble declares India to be a Sovereign, Socialist, Secular, Democratic Republic and secures Justice, Liberty, Equality, and Fraternity.
articles.summary_hi: प्रस्तावना भारत को Sovereign, Socialist, Secular, Democratic Republic घोषित करती है — Justice, Liberty, Equality, Fraternity।
articles.content:
The Preamble is the introductory statement of the Constitution. It was amended by the 42nd Constitutional Amendment Act, 1976, which added the words Socialist, Secular, and Integrity.

Key ideals: Justice (social, economic, political), Liberty (thought, expression, belief, faith, worship), Equality (status and opportunity), and Fraternity assuring dignity and unity of the nation.

The Supreme Court in Kesavananda Bharati (1973) held that the Preamble is part of the Constitution and that the basic structure cannot be amended.

For IB ACIO: 42nd Amendment additions, four justice types, and basic structure link are frequently asked.
articles.content_hi:
प्रस्तावना। 42वें संशोधन (1976) ने Socialist, Secular, Integrity जोड़े।

Justice, Liberty, Equality, Fraternity। Kesavananda Bharati — basic structure।

IB ACIO: 42nd Amendment, 1976 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which Constitutional Amendment added ‘Socialist’ and ‘Secular’ to the Preamble?
articles.question_hi: किस संवैधानिक संशोधन ने प्रस्तावना में ‘Socialist’ और ‘Secular’ जोड़े?
articles.explanation: The 42nd Amendment Act, 1976 added Socialist, Secular, and Integrity to the Preamble.
articles.explanation_hi: 42वें संशोधन अधिनियम, 1976 ने Socialist, Secular और Integrity जोड़े।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Fundamental Rights (Part III) and DPSP (Part IV) editions.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: मौलिक अधिकार (भाग III), DPSP (भाग IV)।

articles.title: Asian Games — India’s Multi-Sport Showcase
articles.title_hi: एशियाई खेल — भारत का बहु-खेल मंच
articles.summary: The Asian Games are held every four years under the Olympic Council of Asia. India hosted in 1951 (Delhi) and 1982 (Delhi).
articles.summary_hi: एशियाई खेल हर चार वर्ष, Olympic Council of Asia के तहत। भारत ने 1951 और 1982 में दिल्ली में आयोजित किए।
articles.content:
The Asian Games are the second-largest multi-sport event after the Olympics for Asian nations. The first Asian Games were held in New Delhi in 1951.

India again hosted in 1982 (New Delhi). The 19th Asian Games were held in Hangzhou, China (2023), where India achieved its best-ever medal tally.

The Olympic Council of Asia (OCA) governs the Games. The next editions rotate among Asian host cities.

For IB ACIO: first Games (Delhi 1951), India host years (1951, 1982), and Hangzhou 2023 best tally are sports CA facts.
articles.content_hi:
पहला Asian Games: नई दिल्ली 1951। भारत मेज़बान: 1951, 1982।

Hangzhou 2023: भारत का सर्वश्रेष्ठ पदक प्रदर्शन। OCA शासी निकाय।

IB ACIO: 1951, 1982, Hangzhou 2023 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Where were the first Asian Games held?
articles.question_hi: प्रथम एशियाई खेल कहाँ आयोजित हुए?
articles.explanation: The first Asian Games were held in New Delhi in 1951.
articles.explanation_hi: प्रथम एशियाई खेल 1951 में नई दिल्ली में हुए।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Olympics 2024 Paris medal haul (10 July edition).
